title: Network Engineer (Cisco ACI Support & Deployment)
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a Network Engineer with strong hands-on experience in Cisco ACI (Application Centric Infrastructure) to support enterprise network operations and participate in ACI deployment and enhancement projects. This role combines L2/L3 operational support with project-based implementation work in a large-scale, production-critical environment.

The successful candidate will work closely with network architects, infrastructure teams, and vendors to ensure network stability, scalability, and successful delivery of ACI-based solutions.

Key Responsibilities

Cisco ACI Operations & Support

  • Provide hands-on support for Cisco ACI fabrics, including day-to-day monitoring, troubleshooting, and incident resolution
  • Support ACI components such as APIC, spine, and leaf switches
  • Perform fault isolation, root cause analysis, and remediation for ACI-related issues
  • Support change, incident, and problem management processes in accordance with operational standards

Network Deployment & Projects

  • Participate in Cisco ACI deployment, migration, and expansion projects
  • Execute fabric builds, policy configuration, and testing activities
  • Support migration from traditional network architectures to ACI environments
  • Work with vendors and internal teams on project planning, implementation, and post-deployment support

Enterprise Network Support

  • Support enterprise networking technologies including routing, switching, VLANs, and network security
  • Work alongside firewall, load balancer, and data center teams to deliver integrated network solutions
  • Support network upgrades, technology refresh, and capacity expansion initiatives

Documentation & Governance

  • Maintain accurate ACI and network documentation, diagrams, and configuration records
  • Support audits, compliance requirements, and operational reviews
  • Contribute to continuous improvement of network operations and deployment standards

Requirements

Experience

  • Minimum 4 to 6 years of network engineering experience
  • Proven hands-on experience in Cisco ACI support and deployment
  • Experience supporting both BAU operations and project-based network implementations
  • Exposure to enterprise or data center environments is preferred

Technical Skills

  • Strong hands-on experience with:
  1. Cisco ACI (APIC, spine, leaf architecture)
  2. Enterprise routing and switching
  3. Traditional and software-defined networking concepts
  • Good understanding of TCP/IP, BGP, OSPF, VLANs, and network segmentation
  • Experience working in high-availability, production environments

Soft Skills

  • Strong troubleshooting and analytical skills
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively in cross-functional teams
  • Clear communication skills for engaging technical and non-technical stakeholders
  • Comfortable working in fast-paced, operationally critical environments

Certifications (Nice to Have)

  • CCNA / CCNP (Data Center or Enterprise)
  • Cisco ACI or Data Center–related certifications

Preferred Profile

  • Experience supporting large-scale enterprise or data center networks
  • Exposure to regulated or SLA-driven environments
  • Willingness to support after-hours maintenance or standby rotations when required

Please send your detailed resume in MS Word format to resume@goldtecHRs.com with

  • Education Level
  • Working experiences
  • Each employment background
  • Reason for leaving each employment
  • Last drawn salary
  • Expected salary
  • Date of availability
